PushEvent:yasyf/captain-hook.summary: added a builtin Go pack (test-gate, gofumpt, golangci-lint) and hardened loader

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-context.summary: scaffolded cc_context: a CLI skeleton with CI, docs, and PyPI release

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-merge.summary: stood up merge-queue repo: CLI skeleton, goreleaser release, cc-notes reconcile

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-notes.summary: added `note expire` to flag stale notes and signed the darwin binaries

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-orchestrate.summary: added long-lived agent sessions: keep-alive supervision and serialize/restore

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-review.summary: released via goreleaser/Homebrew with an embedded SPA and a corrections ledger

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-runtime.summary: stood up cc-runtime: interaction domain, daemon, channel tools, TUI, and plugin

PushEvent:yasyf/cc-squash.summary: scaffolded cc_squash: a CLI skeleton with CI, docs, and PyPI release

PushEvent:yasyf/fusekit.summary: stood up an in-process FUSE host with mount-core primitives and detached holder

PushEvent:yasyf/reposync.summary: rebuilt a filterable, recency-sorted master-detail TUI synced over per-host RPC

PushEvent:yasyf/slop-cop.summary: added `--lines` to report only violations within a touched line range

captain-hook@v3.11.1.summary: wired the SessionEnd reviewer async and skipped non-interactive ends

cc-notes@v0.7.5.summary: moved the pack test script into tests/ so capt-hook skips it

cc-orchestrate@v0.2.4.summary: long-lived agent sessions with keep-alive supervision and serialize/restore

cc-pool@v0.31.5.summary: signed, notarized, and stapled the CCPoolStatus widget app

spawnllm@v0.3.1.summary: threaded cwd and timeout through the call() entrypoint
